nasb.text: Of oaks from Bashan they have made your oars; With ivory they have inlaid your deck of boxwood from the coastlands of Cyprus.

esv.text: Of oaks of Bashan they made your oars; they made your deck of pines from the coasts of Cyprus, inlaid with ivory.

cnv.text: 用巴珊的橡樹做你的槳； 用基提沿岸的黃楊木鑲嵌著象牙，做你的艙板。

ccb.text: 用巴珊的橡木做你的桨， 把象牙镶嵌在基提沿岸的黄杨木上做甲板，
